texto: His [Luke]letter went something like this: "Dear Mr President, Thank you for introducing me to the Hall of Famers and for showing me the Oval Office. I think if I work really hard I will have a chance for both."The next time I saw the president I told him about my son's ambitious plans. His response was beautiful: "Never get between a boy and his dreams
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tim Russert: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “His [Luke]letter went something like this: "Dear Mr President, Thank you for introducing me to th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, boys, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e inspiracao.
